value.zh: 蓝牙与 BLE 安全审计命令集，覆盖适配器状态、附近设备发现、服务与 GATT 特征枚举；测试需固定实验设备 MAC、扫描时长和写入许可。
value.en: A Bluetooth and BLE security-audit command set covering adapter state, nearby-device discovery, service enumeration, and GATT characteristics, with fixed lab-device MACs, scan duration, and write authorization.

value.zh: 启用指定 HCI 适配器并在限定时长内发现经典蓝牙与 BLE 广播，记录地址、名称、RSSI 和发现来源后去重。
value.en: Enable the selected HCI adapter and discover classic Bluetooth plus BLE advertisements for a bounded period, recording and deduplicating addresses, names, RSSI, and discovery source.

value.zh: 连接登记的 BLE 实验设备，列出 Primary Service 与 Characteristic，并只对批准的测试 Handle 执行读取或 marker 写入。
value.en: Connect to a registered BLE lab device, list primary services and characteristics, and read or write markers only on explicitly approved test handles.

value.zh: 端点安全状态与检测验证工具，覆盖 Windows Defender/AMSI 配置、Linux ClamAV 签名和受控 Fixture 扫描；输出用于确认防护启用与检测日志链路。
value.en: Endpoint-security status and detection validation covering Windows Defender and AMSI configuration, Linux ClamAV signatures, and bounded fixture scanning, with output used to confirm protection and logging paths.

value.zh: 读取 AMSI Provider 注册项和 Defender 排除路径，验证保护配置是否存在；示例字符串只用于触发本地扫描链路，不执行绕过。
value.en: Read AMSI provider registration and Defender exclusions to verify protection configuration; the sample string exercises the local scanning path and does not perform a bypass.

value.zh: 更新 ClamAV 签名后仅扫描 /var/tmp/payloader-fixtures，并把命中写入 artifacts 日志，避免无界扫描整个文件系统。
value.en: Update ClamAV signatures and scan only /var/tmp/payloader-fixtures, writing detections to an artifacts log instead of performing an unbounded full-filesystem scan.

value.zh: 枚举自动化脚本模板，用于把端口、HTTP、DNS 与 SMB 发现步骤串联为可复现流水线；每个模板都应限制网段、并发、超时和输出目录。
value.en: Enumeration automation templates that compose port, HTTP, DNS, and SMB discovery into reproducible pipelines, each bounded by network scope, concurrency, timeout, and output directory.

value.zh: 先用 Nmap 只筛选开放的 445/TCP 主机，再由 CrackMapExec 枚举测试账号可见共享；输入网段和并发必须在授权清单内。
value.en: Use Nmap to select hosts with TCP 445 open, then enumerate shares visible to the test identity with CrackMapExec, keeping network input and concurrency within the approved inventory.

value.zh: SearchSploit 与 Exploit-DB 检索参考，用产品、版本、平台和 CVE 筛选公开样例，并在离线审查代码、依赖和适用条件后再决定是否用于实验验证。
value.en: A SearchSploit and Exploit-DB research reference for filtering public samples by product, version, platform, and CVE before offline review of code, dependencies, and applicability.

value.zh: 使用 -m 复制选定样例到当前审查目录，或用 -x 只读查看源码；先核对路径、作者说明、依赖和受影响版本。
value.en: Use -m to copy a selected sample into the review directory or -x to inspect source read-only, first checking path, author notes, dependencies, and affected versions.

value.zh: Exploit-DB 公开漏洞样例检索入口，适合按产品与 CVE 查找研究材料；搜索结果需要与供应商公告、目标版本和源码审查相互验证。
value.en: An Exploit-DB search entry for public vulnerability research samples by product and CVE, with results cross-checked against vendor advisories, target versions, and source review.

value.zh: 以 JSON 搜索 Apache Struts 相关公开样例并仅输出标题、路径和 CVE 编号，随后离线审查源码与适用版本。
value.en: Search public Apache Struts samples as JSON and output only title, path, and CVE identifiers before offline source and affected-version review.

value.zh: 授权运维与实验环境中的文件传输参考，覆盖 HTTP、SMB、Base64 和本地 DNS marker 通道；每种方式都需校验哈希、目标路径、权限和清理结果。
value.en: A file-transfer reference for authorized operations and labs covering HTTP, SMB, Base64, and a local DNS marker channel, with hash, destination path, permissions, and cleanup verified for each method.

value.zh: 在实验主机启动启用 SMB2 的认证共享并映射到 Windows 测试端，传输 marker 文件后核对 SHA-256 和共享清理。
value.en: Start an authenticated SMB2-enabled share on the lab host and map it from the Windows fixture, then verify the marker-file SHA-256 and remove the share.

value.zh: 把实验二进制编码为单行 Base64，在目标 Fixture 解码到指定文件，再比较源文件与目标文件的哈希。
value.en: Encode a lab binary as single-line Base64, decode it to the designated fixture path, and compare source and destination file hashes.

value.zh: 本地 DNS Marker 传输边界

patches.value:
MARKER=PAYLOADER_DNS_TRANSFER_A1
DATA=$(printf '%s' "$MARKER" | base64 | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '=')
for i in $(seq 0 40 ${#DATA}); do dig +time=1 +tries=1 @127.0.0.1 "${DATA:$i:40}.transfer.lab.test" A; done

value.zh: 把固定 marker 分段编码后仅发送到 127.0.0.1 实验解析器，用于验证 DNS 长度、日志和出口策略，不读取或传输真实文件。
value.en: Encode and split a fixed marker and send it only to the 127.0.0.1 lab resolver to validate DNS length, logging, and egress policy without reading or transferring real files.

value.zh: 被动信息收集工具集，整理证书透明度、公开 DNS、搜索索引、代码托管和历史 URL 线索；候选资产需要去重、时间标记和所有权确认。
value.en: A passive information-gathering toolkit for certificate transparency, public DNS, search indexes, code hosting, and historical URL leads, with candidate assets deduplicated, timestamped, and ownership-verified.

value.zh: 内网侦察命令参考，覆盖本机网络配置、路由、邻居、DNS、共享与登记网段服务发现；输出应按主机和时间保存并避免无界扫描。
value.en: An internal-reconnaissance command reference covering local network configuration, routes, neighbors, DNS, shares, and service discovery on registered ranges, with host- and time-scoped output and no unbounded scanning.
